content:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the output of the relational expression R - R' where R is a relation and R' is a subset of R?",
      "options": ["A) All elements in R", "B) All elements in R except those in R'", "C) The union of R and R'", "D) The intersection of R and R'"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "The output of R - R' will be all elements in R except those in R'. This is because relational subtraction removes all elements that are present in both R and R'.
